title: Multiple interface descriptions from a single image
use_when: Multiple interface descriptions from a single image. Use when the user needs a product workflow for design & prototyping related to multiple interface descriptions from a single image. Trigger terms: pm, ux, design, communication, perspectives.
do_not_use_when: Do not use Multiple interface descriptions from a single image when the request is mainly metric diagnosis, pricing, GTM, or implementation planning without UX evidence; route to the narrower Productize skill that owns that artifact instead. Do not use it when the user lacks enough context to distinguish facts, assumptions, and decision risk.
output_artifact: Multiple interface descriptions from a single image UX/design review with findings, constraints, fixes, and acceptance checks
framework_fit: Multiple interface descriptions from a single image fits Design work in the Design lifecycle when the user needs Multiple interface descriptions from a single image UX/design review with findings, constraints, fixes, and acceptance checks and has enough product context to make tradeoffs explicit. Use it to produce a decision-ready artifact, not a framework tour.
failure_modes: Produces Multiple interface descriptions from a single image UX/design review with findings, constraints, fixes, and acceptance checks without tying recommendations to the user's Design stage, evidence, and decision pressure.
Treats Multiple interface descriptions from a single image as generic Design advice instead of naming assumptions, missing inputs, risks, and the next validation step.
Fails to route away from Multiple interface descriptions from a single image when another Productize skill owns the requested artifact more directly.

examples.prompt: Use $multiple-interface-descriptions-from-a-single-image to turn this multiple context into a decision-ready Multiple interface descriptions from a single image UX/design review with findings, constraints, fixes, and acceptance checks.
examples.expected_artifact: Multiple interface descriptions from a single image UX/design review with findings, constraints, fixes, and acceptance checks
